title: January 31
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 31''' is the 31st day of the year. There are 334 days remaining (335 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1910s#1911|1911]] – [[Eddie Byrne]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Eric Walker]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Christian Simpson]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Bobby Moynihan]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 52|''Star Wars Weekly'' 52]] published.
*[[1995]] – ''[[Star Wars: Droids Special]]'' published.
*[[1997]] – The [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|Special Edition]] of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] is released in theaters.
*[[2000]] – [[Gil Kane]] dies.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 26|''Star Wars'' (1998) 26]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 13|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 13]] published.
*[[2012]] – [[Al Rio]] dies.
*2012 – [[Star Wars Insider 131|''Star Wars Insider'' 131]] published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[The History of Mandalorian Armor]]'' released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 4: Last Flight of the Harbinger]]'' trade paperback published.
*2017 – [[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story – The Official Collector's Edition|''Rogue One: A Star Wars Story'' – The Official Collector's Edition]] hardcover published.
*2017 – [[Bloodline (novel)|''Bloodline'']] published in paperback.
*[[2018]] – [[William O'Connor]] dies.
*2018 – [[The Last Jedi – DJ – Most Wanted 1|''The Last Jedi – DJ – Most Wanted'' 1]] published.
*2018 – ''[[Forces of Destiny—Rose & Paige]]'' published.
*2018 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 16|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 16]] published.
*[[2020]] – [[Alan Harris]] dies.
*[[2022]] – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: Podracing|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: Podracing]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Omnibus Vol. 1]]'' second printing published.
*2023 – ''[[The Princess and the Scoundrel]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*[[2024]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 40|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 40]] published.
<noinclude>
